MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: J GREGG RIEHL FOR PLAINTIFF 891 POST,INC. AGUSTO ILLIDEE ALSO PRESENT.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY LINDA QUINN FOR DEFENDANT ANNA CHACON

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: CASE STAYED UNTIL 1/7/07. DEFENDANT TO PAY $2934.80 BACK RENT WITH MONEY ORDER BY 7/13/06 TO 1375 SUTTER ST #308. IN ADDITION, DEFENDANT TO PAY $733.70 RENT BY THE 6TH OF EACH MONTH BY MONEY ORDER. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY, PLAINTIFF MAY FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION WITH 72 HOUR NOTICE EITHER PERSONALLY SERVED OR DELIVERED TO 891 POST ST #106, FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AND UNPAID RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES. DEFENDANTS MAY OPPOSE MOTION. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH TERMS, DISMISSAL TO BE FILED ON OR BEFORE 7/15/07. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS. ALL PARTIES AGREE

JUDGE PRO TEM:IRVING PFEFFER ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE(218)
